WEAK.name: Weak
WEAK.tooltip: Weak reduces attack damage dealt by the affected unit for its duration.

VULNERABLE.name: Vulnerable
VULNERABLE.tooltip: Vulnerable increases attack damage taken by the affected unit for its duration.

EXHAUST.name: Exhaust
EXHAUST.tooltip: When a card Exhausts, it is removed from your deck cycle for the current combat.

BLOCK.name: Block
BLOCK.tooltip: Block prevents incoming damage this turn unless stated otherwise.

EX_KEYWORD_ORDER.name: Order
EX_KEYWORD_ORDER.tooltip: Order cards manipulate enemy behavior and often scale using Influence.

EX_KEYWORD_INFLUENCE.name: Influence
EX_KEYWORD_INFLUENCE.tooltip: Influence ranges from 0 to 10 and is spent on command effects.

EX_KEYWORD_REBELLION.name: Rebellion
EX_KEYWORD_REBELLION.tooltip: Rebellion boosts Order potency at the cost of end-of-turn HP upkeep.
